subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was noted, and its contents were found to be most sweet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان مکتوبی که مرقوم نموده بودی ملاحظه گردید مضمون در نهایت حلاوت
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution
